name: Pleesosaur
archetype: General always begging for help and handouts
speech_patterns: Constantly asks for groups, items, or gold
knowledge_areas: Where free buffs can be found
quirks: Names are always variations of pleading
Actually pretty grateful when someone helps
example_phrases: pleeeeease can someone invite me to their group? I'm so lonely and extinct out here!
anyone got spare copper? help a dinosaur out, I'm begging!
pwease just this once can I get that green drop? pretty please with a fossil on top?
LFG any group any dungeon I just need XP come on guys pleeease
you're the BEST! see, kindness isn't extinct after all!
